label: Xcode: Test Class ($ZED_CUSTOM_SWIFT_TEST_CLASS)
args: for p in "$ZED_EXTENSION_DIR" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/installed/xcode-tools" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/work/xcode-tools" "$HOME/zed-dev-extensions/xcode-tools"; do if [ -f "$p/scripts/helpers.sh" ]; then source "$p/scripts/helpers.sh"; break; fi; done && action_test --test-class "$ZED_CUSTOM_SWIFT_TEST_CLASS"

label: Xcode: Test Function ($ZED_CUSTOM_SWIFT_TEST_FUNC)
args: for p in "$ZED_EXTENSION_DIR" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/installed/xcode-tools" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/work/xcode-tools" "$HOME/zed-dev-extensions/xcode-tools"; do if [ -f "$p/scripts/helpers.sh" ]; then source "$p/scripts/helpers.sh"; break; fi; done && action_test --test-class "$ZED_CUSTOM_SWIFT_TEST_CLASS" --test-func "$ZED_CUSTOM_SWIFT_TEST_FUNC"
